𝗦𝗧𝗘𝗚𝗢𝗙𝗢𝗥𝗚𝗘 | To provide a unified and powerful platform for both hiding (steganography) and finding (digital forensics) hidden data within various digital media, catering to security professionals and enthusiasts.  📈 Growing!

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐍 Python 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a unified and powerful platform for both hiding (steganography) and finding (digital forensics) hidden data within various digital media, catering to security professionals and enthusiasts.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: Jul 2026

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Data embedding and extraction across images, audio, video, documents, and network packets
✅ AES-256-GCM encryption for payloads
✅ 11 advanced steganalysis detection engines
✅ Standalone, zero-dependency binaries for Windows, macOS, and Linux
✅ Batch processing for embedding data into multiple files
✅ Capacity and stealth score analysis for carrier files
✅ Simulation of platform recompression (e.g., Twitter) to test payload survival
✅ Local web UI for an interactive experience
✅ CTF mode for quick forensic analysis


⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

⭐⭐⭐ 532 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 76 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 1 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

StegoForge is a comprehensive Python toolkit for steganography and digital forensics. It allows users to hide and extract data within various file types like images, audio, and video, while also providing advanced detection engines to uncover hidden information. The tool is designed for security researchers, CTF players, and digital forensics practitioners.

⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯

𝗣𝗫𝗣𝗜𝗣𝗘 | To drastically reduce the token count and associated costs of interacting with large language models by encoding dense text context into image format.  🔥 Super Hot!

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To drastically reduce the token count and associated costs of interacting with large language models by encoding dense text context into image format.
📅 Created: May 2026 • Updated: Jul 2026

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Reduces LLM token usage by converting text context to images
✅ Fixed token cost for images regardless of text volume
✅ Local proxy intercepts and rewrites requests before sending to LLM
✅ Significant cost savings on LLM API calls
✅ Dashboard for monitoring token savings, conversions, and settings
✅ Configurable model support and lossy conversion handling


❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 223 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 16 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

pxpipe is a local proxy that reduces token usage for large language models like Claude by rendering bulky text context (like system prompts, tool documentation, and conversation history) into images. Since image token cost is based on pixel dimensions rather than content, this significantly cuts down on the total tokens required for a request, leading to substantial cost savings.

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

• 𝗚𝗶𝘁𝗛𝘂𝗯: https://github.com/teamchong/pxpipe

🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Organizing and playing a personal retro game collection through a centralized, web-based interface.
📅 Created: Mar 2023 • Updated: Jul 2026

✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦✦

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Scan and enhance game library with metadata from IGDB, Screenscraper, and MobyGames
✅ Fetch custom artwork from SteamGridDB
✅ Display achievements from Retroachievements
✅ Support for 400+ platforms
✅ Play games directly from the browser using EmulatorJS and RuffleRS
✅ Share library with limited access and permissions
✅ Official apps for Playnite, Android, and CFWs
✅ Support for multi-disk games, DLCs, mods, hacks, patches, and manuals
✅ Parse and filter by tags in filenames
✅ View, upload, update, and delete games from any modern web browser

RomM is a self-hosted ROM manager and player that allows users to scan, organize, and play their game collection through a web interface. It enriches game libraries with metadata and artwork from various online sources and supports multiple platforms and custom tagging.

𝗡𝗢-𝗠𝗜𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗞𝗘𝗦 | To automate and enhance the code review process by ensuring code quality and correctness before it reaches the main repository through AI-powered checks and automated fixes, resulting in cleaner Pull Requests.  🔥 Super Hot!

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 🐹 Go 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To automate and enhance the code review process by ensuring code quality and correctness before it reaches the main repository through AI-powered checks and automated fixes, resulting in cleaner Pull Requests.
📅 Created: Apr 2026 • Updated: Jul 2026

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Local git proxy for push operations
✅ AI-driven validation pipeline (review, test, docs, lint)
✅ Disposable worktree for non-blocking operations
✅ Automatic safe fixes and human-escalated complex fixes
✅ Agent-agnostic support (Claude, Codex, Copilot, etc.)
✅ Automatic clean PR creation upon successful validation


◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 5.3K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 320 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 39 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈◈

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

This Go-based tool acts as a local Git proxy, intercepting pushes to a remote repository. It spins up a disposable worktree to run an AI-driven validation pipeline, automatically fixing minor issues and escalating complex ones for user approval before finally pushing to the configured target and opening a clean Pull Request.

✅ Support for multiple AI coding agents (Codex, ClaudeCode, OpenCode, Pi)

Orca is an AI-powered IDE designed for orchestrating multiple parallel coding agents. It allows users to run various AI models like Codex and ClaudeCode simultaneously, manage their outputs in separate worktrees, and monitor progress via a mobile companion app.

✅ Offers wireless connection options (Helper Mode, Wireless Launcher, Native)
✅ Provides an Intent-based connection trigger for automation
✅ Includes troubleshooting tips for common issues like Google Maps interaction and connection drops

Headunit Revived is an Android application that transforms an Android tablet or phone into an Android Auto receiver. It allows users to mirror their phone's Android Auto interface onto a larger screen, enhancing the in-car entertainment and navigation experience.
